_meta.description: Volume metrics section registered input nodes. 6 inputs defining building volume geometry and air tightness parameters. All are C-classified (model-specific). Note: these are in S12 (not S11 as previously documented).

instances.label: Floor-to-Floor Height
instances.note: Height between floors. Used in volume calculations.

instances.label: Number of Storeys
instances.note: Number of storeys for volume calculations. Default 1.5 (typical for Part 9 with basement).

instances.label: Shielding
instances.note: Wind shielding class for N-factor lookup. Used with climate zone and storeys to determine infiltration N-factor from N_FACTOR_TABLE.

instances.label: Air Tightness Method
instances.note: Air leakage class or test method. Presets: AL-1A=0.89, AL-1B=1.17, AL-2A=0.71, AL-2B=0.94, AL-3A=0.53, AL-3B=0.70, AL-4A=0.35, AL-4B=0.47. Or MEASURED/PH_CLASSIC/PH_LOW/PH_PLUS for special calculations.

instances.label: Measured ACH50
instances.note: Blower door test result. Only used when airTightness.method = 'MEASURED'. Converted to NRL50 via achToNrl().

instances.label: Conditioned Volume
instances.note: Total conditioned volume of the building. Used in ACH50 target, ELA10, and volume-to-area ratio calculations.

signature.inputs: These ARE the inputs (registered via graph.registerInput in VolumeMetricsNodes.js)
signature.output: Values stored in MultiModelState, consumed by envelope area/U-value, air tightness NRL50/ACH50, infiltration heat loss/gain, and geometry ratio calculations

preconditions.description: Must have at least partial storey
Air changes per hour cannot be negative

invariants.condition: NRL50 presets map to specific air leakage rates
invariants.description: AL-1A through AL-4B correspond to NBC air leakage classifications

behavior.output: Affects N-factor lookup and volume calculations
behavior.note: N-factor uses getStoryKey() to map storey count

behavior.output: Triggers recomputation of N-factor (g_110) and infiltration heat loss (i_103)
Triggers recomputation of NRL50 (g_108), ACH50 target (d_109), ELA10 (d_110), and infiltration heat loss/gain
behavior.note: Preset methods use fixed NRL50 values; MEASURED converts from ACH50 input

behavior.output: Triggers NRL50 recomputation only when method = 'MEASURED'
Triggers recomputation of ACH50 target (d_109), ELA10 (d_110), volume/area ratios (g_105, i_105), and NRL50 when method=MEASURED

edgeCases.rationale: Fallback to least restrictive common classification
Zone 2, Normal shielding, 1.5 storeys is typical default
